scripts.export:wp-content: npm run cli rm -- -rf .export/wp-content && mkdir -p .export/wp-content/uploads && run-p export:wp-content:*
scripts.export:db: mkdir -p .export/sql && npm run wp db -- export .export/sql/local.sql
scripts.pretest:php:lint: npm run test:php:start && npm run test-composer install -- --no-interaction
scripts.test:php:lint: npm run test:php:start && npm run test-composer lint
scripts.pretest:php:unit: npm run test:php:start && npm run test-composer install -- --no-interaction
scripts.test:php:unit: npm run test:php:start && wp-env run --config=.wp-env.tests.json --env-cwd=wp-content/plugins/snow-monkey-google-fonts wordpress vendor/bin/phpunit -c .phpunit.xml.dist --verbose
scripts.zip:pack: rsync -a --exclude='/vendor' --exclude='/node_modules' --exclude='.*' --exclude='*.xml.dist' --exclude='/tests' --exclude='package*.json' . snow-monkey-google-fonts && wp-env start && npm run composer install -- --no-dev -d snow-monkey-google-fonts
scripts.zip: npm run clean:zip && npm run zip:pack && npm run zip:archive
scripts.make-pot: wp-env start && npm run wp i18n -- make-pot . ./languages/snow-monkey-google-fonts.pot -- --exclude=.*,src
